pr.title: Addressing PR comments
pr.body:

<details>

<summary>Original prompt</summary>

> Switch the x402 Worker from Base Sepolia testnet to Base mainnet. Update the recipient / pay-to address to 0xed7d30e8bc643503f9da261ed8e623bb6ecf6189 in all relevant config files (wrangler.jsonc, code, env vars, etc.). Make sure xAI services under /xai/ remain properly integrated and SKILL.md is ready for agentic.market. Keep all existing proxy and payment logic intact. This is for going live on mainnet.


</details>
pr.author: Copilot
